item.title: Master Salary Negotiation as a Black Woman ✊ • Research industry salary standards first. • Highlight your unique skills and experiences. • Use: “I bring X years of Y to your team.” • Be ready to counter with data-driven arguments. How will you leverage your experiences to advocate for fair pay? #negotiation #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Master Salary Negotiation as a Black Woman ✊ • Research industry salary standards first. • Highlight your unique skills and experiences. • Use: “I bring X years of Y to your team.” • Be ready to counter with data-driven arguments. How will you leverage your experiences to advocate for fair pay? #negotiation #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
